qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_clasif_sujeto as ID, t.oi_clasif_sujeto as CODE, lc.d_clasif_suj + \' - \' +ls.d_sujeto as TEXT, t.oi_sujeto as PID FROM LEG40_CLASIF_SUJ as t, LEG40_SUJETOS as ls, LEG41_CLASIF as lc JOIN t.oi_sujeto INNER ls.oi_sujeto, t.oi_clasif_suj LEFT OUTER lc.oi_clasif_suj WHERE lc.c_tareas = \'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
